categories.name: claim_forms
categories.description: First notices of loss, claim forms, proof of loss, statements of loss, and claim intake documents.

categories.name: policy_documents
categories.description: Policies, endorsements, coverage summaries, schedules, declarations, and policy correspondence.

categories.name: reports
categories.description: Engineer, adjuster, inspection, cause-and-origin, restoration, and damage assessment reports.

categories.name: photos
categories.description: Photos, image logs, screenshots, and image-only damage sections.

categories.name: invoices
categories.description: Invoices, bills, estimates, purchase orders, mitigation charges, and repair cost documents.

categories.name: spreadsheets
categories.description: Schedules of values, equipment lists, cost spreadsheets, ledgers, and tabular claim workbooks.

categories.name: correspondence
categories.description: Emails, letters, claim notes, and communications between claim parties.

categories.name: legal_documents
categories.description: Attorney letters, legal demands, litigation notices, releases, and settlement documents.

categories.name: other
categories.description: Documents that do not match any configured industrial claim category.
